title: rhododendron muscicola
intro: Rhododendron muscicola, also known as the "musk rhododendron" or "musk azalea," is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron muscicola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
